data.title: AMTD IDEA Group and Partners Integrate Cryptocurrency into Strategic Reserves
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, AMTD IDEA Group, listed on both the New York Stock Exchange and the Singapore Exchange, along with its subsidiaries AMTD Digital Inc. and The Generation Essentials Group (TGE), have announced that cryptocurrency will play a significant role in their strategic liquidity reserves. 

The strategic reserves, comprising bank deposits and other unencumbered, unpledged liquid investments, totaled approximately $240 million as of June 30, 2025. The focus of the cryptocurrency asset portfolio will prioritize investments in Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and USDT.

Among the three NYSE-listed companies under AMTD Group, TGE will lead efforts to expand and concentrate on opportunities and developments related to cryptocurrency. Since its inception, TGE's name has symbolized both 'The Generation Essentials' and the concept of 'Token Generation Event.'

data.title: Elon Musk Announces AI-Driven Software Company Macrohard
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Elon Musk recently announced the formation of a new AI-focused software company named Macrohard under the xAI initiative. Musk described the name as a playful nod, but emphasized the project's authenticity. The concept is to create a software company entirely simulated by AI, drawing inspiration from companies like Microsoft that do not produce physical hardware.

xAI's Grok explained that Macrohard is a tribute to Microsoft, aiming to establish a software company fully operated by AI. The idea is that since companies like Microsoft do not manufacture hardware, AI could theoretically replicate their entire operations, from programming to management. Musk confirmed the project's legitimacy and mentioned that they are currently hiring.

data.title: XRP Surpasses $3 Mark with Significant Market Cap Increase
data.description: According to PANews, XRP has recently surpassed the $3 threshold, reaching $3.05. This marks a 24-hour increase of 6.41%. The latest data from 8 MarketCap indicates that XRP's market capitalization has exceeded $180 billion, reaching $181.41 billion. This positions XRP above companies like Pinduoduo and Deutsche Telekom in the global asset market capitalization rankings, placing it at the 107th spot. Currently, Pinduoduo's market cap stands at $184.05 billion.

data.title: Musk Optimistic About Fully Reusable Orbital Rocket by Next Year
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, SpaceX CEO Elon Musk has described the development of a fully reusable orbital rocket as one of humanity's most challenging engineering problems, surpassing the difficulty of landing on the moon. This complexity, he noted, is why it remains unsolved.

Musk expressed cautious optimism about achieving full reusability for the Starship by next year. He also highlighted orbital refueling as another critical technology, which he considers relatively simpler. If successful, this advancement could also be realized next year. Musk envisions that these developments would enable the expansion of human consciousness and life to other planets and even stars.

data.title: South Korean Man Arrested in Thailand Over $50 Million Cryptocurrency Money Laundering Case
data.description:
According to PANews, Thai authorities have arrested a South Korean man in connection with a $50 million cryptocurrency money laundering operation. The arrest took place at Bangkok's Suvarnabhumi Airport on Saturday, as reported by the Thai National News. The suspect, a 33-year-old identified as Han, faces charges of fraud, computer crimes, money laundering, and involvement in a criminal organization.

The Technology Crime Suppression Division (TCSD) of Thailand coordinated the arrest after Han's arrival in the country. Immigration officials detained him at the airport checkpoint, where his mobile phone was confiscated. Investigators discovered multiple cryptocurrency accounts linked to the money laundering network on his device.

data.title: XRP Surpasses Major Corporations in Global Market Value Rankings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, XRP has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing several major corporations in terms of market capitalization. As of August 23, data from 8marketcap indicates that XRP's market value stands at $181.08 billion. This places it ahead of companies such as Pinduoduo, which has a market capitalization of $180.45 billion, BlackRock at $177.79 billion, Xiaomi at $175.41 billion, and Citigroup at $175.36 billion. XRP currently ranks 108th in the global asset market value rankings.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $111,685 and $117,429 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $115,610, up by 2.34%.
